seoTitle: Aubin Grove vs Australind — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Aubin Grove and Australind. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Aubin Grove vs Australind: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aubin Grove and Australind.
heading: Aubin Grove vs Australind — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aubin Grove, Western Australia and Australind, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Aubin Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Australind (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aubin Grove or Australind safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aubin Grove has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Australind scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aubin Grove scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Australind scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aubin Grove or Australind?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Aubin Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
